PUPPET_FILE

    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('produces')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

      PsiElement(NAME)('file')

      PsiElement(NAME)('file')

      PsiElement(NAME)('consumes')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')

    PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('key')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiErrorElement:';' expected, got '$'
        PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiElement(NAME)('otherkey')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('othervar')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')

      PsiElement(NAME)('file')

        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
      PsiPuppetBracedAnyArgumentsListBlockImpl(BRACED_ANY_ARGUMENTS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('key')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')

            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('otherkey')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
